channel.title: Twitter - @elonmusk
channel.description: 自动生成的Twitter RSS - 最后更新: 2026-03-13 22:21 UTC | 来源实例: https://xcancel.com

item.title: @elonmusk: I brought this painting to life using Grok. I could play around with this for days. I'm posting my a...
item.description: I brought this painting to life using Grok. I could play around with this for days. I'm posting my ai-art and satire picture over on@TheWokeObserver, my new account, so I don't clutter your feed with Grok stuff here.

item.title: @elonmusk: Grok is the search engine that Google used to be. The results are actually what you were looking for...
item.description: Grok is the search engine that Google used to be. The results are actually what you were looking for, and then some. 10/10.

item.title: @elonmusk: “Mercy to the guilty is cruelty to the innocent.” — Adam Smith
item.description: “Mercy to the guilty is cruelty to the innocent.” — Adam Smith

item.title: @elonmusk: 🚨 JUST IN: JD Vance absolutely DEMOLISHES one of the Democrats' key arguments against the SAVE Ameri...
item.description: 🚨 JUST IN: JD Vance absolutely DEMOLISHES one of the Democrats' key arguments against the SAVE America Act "Even if you take the Democrats at their word—even if illegal aliens voting is very rare, then why don't we BAN it anyway? It's NOT that complicated." "I don't get it! The Democrats say 'this never happens' or 'it only happens very rarely!' But then they say 'we must not stop it!'" "It doesn't make a damn bit of sense! We need to get ALL illegal aliens stopped from voting in our elections! It's VERY common sense stuff!" 🔥

item.title: @elonmusk: 🚨🇺🇸 Florida just passed a bill requiring proof of citizenship to vote. DeSantis will sign it, obviou...
item.description: 🚨🇺🇸 Florida just passed a bill requiring proof of citizenship to vote. DeSantis will sign it, obviously. The left will call this voter suppression. Normal people call it "making sure voters are actually citizens." Wild concept, apparently. Watch how fast this gets challenged in court. Because in 2026 America, verifying you're a citizen before voting in citizen elections is somehow controversial. Fox News

item.title: @elonmusk: Me: ChatGPT, create a video of George Washington dancing disco. ChatGPT: “Sorry, I can’t generate vi...
item.description: Me: ChatGPT, create a video of George Washington dancing disco. ChatGPT: “Sorry, I can’t generate videos. Would you like step-by-step instructions on how to trans your kindergartner?” Me:@Grok, create a video of George Washington dancing disco. Grok: 🫡🇺🇸

item.title: @elonmusk: Elon and Maye Musk with Lil Elon ❤️ Made using@GrokImagine
item.description: Elon and Maye Musk with Lil Elon ❤️ Made using@GrokImagine

item.title: @elonmusk: In 1903, Henry Ford’s lawyer was advised not to buy stock in Ford. “The horse is here to stay,” he w...
item.description: In 1903, Henry Ford’s lawyer was advised not to buy stock in Ford. “The horse is here to stay,” he was told by a local bank president. He bought $5,000 worth of stock and sold it in 1919 for $12.5 million.

item.title: @elonmusk: Common sense. A simple test for immigrants is: would you enjoy working them. If so, they would be an...
item.description: Common sense. A simple test for immigrants is: would you enjoy working them. If so, they would be an asset to America.

item.title: @elonmusk: xAI is really strong on price to performance grok 4.20 (beta) is opus 4.5 level with significantly f...
item.description: xAI is really strong on price to performance grok 4.20 (beta) is opus 4.5 level with significantly faster inference, significantly lower cost, and a lower hallucination rate opus 4.5 costs $5 input and $25 output per million tokens, while grok 4.20 costs $2 and $6

item.title: @elonmusk: 🚨🇺🇸 VP Vance nails it: "If illegals voting is so rare, why not ban it anyway?" Crystal clear logic, ...
item.description: 🚨🇺🇸 VP Vance nails it: "If illegals voting is so rare, why not ban it anyway?" Crystal clear logic, right? But nah, the Senate's the real clown show. It's not sense they're missing, it's good faith. Who's even buying their excuses?

item.title: @elonmusk: To Save Time, CNN Will Now Run Retractions Simultaneously With News Storiesbuff.ly/qEWLcI1
item.description: To Save Time, CNN Will Now Run Retractions Simultaneously With News Storiesbuff.ly/qEWLcI1

item.title: @elonmusk: Starlink providing reliable connectivity in Zimbabwe 🛰️❤️

item.title: @elonmusk: Failing to pass SAVE is an act of high treason against the people of America
item.description: Failing to pass SAVE is an act of high treason against the people of America
